content:
📢 **System Update!**

The chat system and profile settings have received a major stability upgrade!
- The system now natively handles users who haven't fully configured their profiles with advanced resilient fallbacks, so sending direct messages, flagging properties, or creating room posts will never crash.
- New users will now see a friendly, non-intrusive reminder under the gear icon to set up their profiles to enhance collaboration.

Enjoy the smoother experience! 🔥
